rulings.Case Title: DON MONSON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, AUGUST 29, 2007, LINE 1. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL DAVID DONADIO'S (BRAYTON PURCELL) MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF DON MONSON: HEARING REQUIRED. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: KATHRYN J JOHNSON et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, AUGUST 29, 2007, LINE 2. DEFENDANT PNEUMO ABEX, L.L.C.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: HEARING REQUIRED TO ADDRESS ADMISSIBILITY OF LECOUR AND ALLEN DEPOSITIONS. MOTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF BECAUSE THE DISCLOSURE OF W. R. JOHNSON CAME ONLY THREE DAYS BEFORE DEFENDANT FILED ITS MOTION. PLAINTIFF WAS GIVEN THE OPPORTUNITY TO DEPOSE OTHER WITNESSES BUT HAS SUBMITTED NO FURTHER EVIDENCE. MR. TEMPLIN'S DECLARATION FAILS TO EXPLAIN THE BASIS FOR HIS CONCLUSION THAT THE BRAKES IDENTIFIED BY W. R. JOHNSON CONTAINED ASBESTOS. ALTHOUGH TEMPLIN CITES TO SEVERAL ARTICLES, HE FAILS TO EXPLAIN WHAT IT IS IN THOSE ARTICLES THAT SUPPORT HIS CONCLUSION. AS A CONSEQUENCE, HIS OPINION IS NOT BASED ON ANY APPARENT FACTS THAT HAVE BEEN DISCLOSED TO THE COURT. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: JOILENE GROVE VS. AL CABRINI et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, AUGUST 29, 2007, LINE 11. DEFENDANTS PREMIER REAL ESTATE GROUP, ANTONIA ABRUZZO-RAMIREZ AND BRADY HOBBY'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION; CERTAIN ALLEGED DEFECTS ARE WITHIN THE SCOPE OF C. C. SECTION 2079. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND IN TEN DAYS AS TO THE EIGHTH CAUSE OF ACTION TO ALLEGE FACTS GIVING RISE TO A DUTY OF CARE BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DENY MOTION TO STRIKE BASED ON ALLEGATIONS IN PARAGRAPHS 38 THROUGH 40 AND 42. =(302/PJM/AP)
